title: pouteria buluensis
intro: Pouteria buluensis is a species of tree native to the tropical regions of Borneo, belonging to the family Sapotaceae. The bark, leaves, and roots of this tree have been used in traditional medicine, showcasing its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pouteria buluensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its use as an antidiarrheal agent. Pouteria buluensis is often prepared as a decoction or tincture for medicinal use, highlighting its significance in traditional herbal medicine.
